interfaces.name: ReviewVerdict
interfaces.signature: enum ReviewVerdict: String, Codable, Sendable { case inScope, flaggedForReview, newBillable, nothingToFlag }
interfaces.notes: Canonical verdict vocabulary used by persistence, services, and UI. No lane may define a parallel enum.

interfaces.name: BillabilityRecommendation
interfaces.signature: enum BillabilityRecommendation: String, Codable, Sendable { case none, likelyIncluded, recommendChangeOrder }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Separate axis from Verdict so flagged items can carry a soft lean.

interfaces.name: AnalysisMode
interfaces.signature: enum AnalysisMode: String, Codable, Sendable { case aiAssisted, manual }
interfaces.notes: Unifies Claude's ExtractorOrigin and Codex's AnalysisMode into one name, used on sessions and review items.

interfaces.name: AnalysisOutcome
interfaces.signature: enum AnalysisOutcome: String, Codable, Sendable { case producedReviewItems, nothingToFlag, cancelled, failed }
interfaces.notes: Session-level outcome; quota only increments for completed AI runs that end in producedReviewItems or nothingToFlag.

interfaces.name: ModelAvailabilityReason
interfaces.signature: enum ModelAvailabilityReason: String, Codable, Sendable { case available, ineligibleHardware, disabledByUser, modelNotDownloaded, quotaExceeded, evictedMidRun }
interfaces.notes: Single source of truth for Intake and error presentation.

interfaces.name: BaselineClauseKind
interfaces.signature: enum BaselineClauseKind: String, Codable, Sendable { case deliverable, exclusion }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: BaselineClause
interfaces.signature: @Model final class BaselineClause { var id: UUID; var kind: BaselineClauseKind; var text: String; var orderIndex: Int; var baseline: Baseline? }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Stable clause identity for matching and history linking.

interfaces.name: Baseline
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Baseline { var id: UUID; var agreementSummary: String; var deliverables: [BaselineClause]; var exclusions: [BaselineClause]; var revisionPolicy: String?; var assumptions: String?; var timeline: String?; var clientDependencies: String?; var layer2DisclosureExpanded: Bool; var lastEditedAt: Date; var project: Project? }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Layer 1 = agreementSummary only, required.

interfaces.name: Project
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Project { var id: UUID; var name: String; var clientName: String?; var baseline: Baseline?; var analysisSessions: [AnalysisSession]; var createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Free-tier cap = total Project count <= 1. Cascade delete verified by dedicated test.

interfaces.name: ReviewItemDraft
interfaces.signature: struct ReviewItemDraft: Sendable, Identifiable, Codable { let id: UUID; let sourceQuote: String; let normalizedAskText: String; var verdict: Verdict; var rationale: String; var matchedBaselineClauseID: UUID?; var matchedBaselineClauseText: String?; var confidence: Double; var billability: BillabilityRecommendation; var isResolved: Bool; var startOffset: Int; var endOffset: Int; let origin: ProcessingOrigin }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED BY COORDINATOR TIE-BREAK: normalized, post-resolution DTO only. Produced by AIScopeExtractor directly, and by finalizeManualAnalysis when converting a resolved, non-discarded ManualTaggingChunk. Deliberately has no isDiscarded field.

interfaces.name: AnalysisSession
interfaces.signature: @Model final class AnalysisSession { var id: UUID; var project: Project?; var rawSourceText: String; var sourceOrigin: SourceOrigin; var processingOrigin: ProcessingOrigin; var foundationModelsAvailabilityAtRun: FoundationModelsAvailability?; var quotaCharged: Bool; var startedAt: Date; var completedAt: Date; var outcome: AnalysisOutcomeKind; var reviewItems: [ReviewItem]; var draftDocument: DraftDocument? }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Only persisted on completion. sourceOrigin comes from the orchestrator call (AI path) or from ManualTaggingDraftRecord.sourceOrigin (manual path, at finalize).

interfaces.name: DraftDocument
interfaces.signature: @Model final class DraftDocument { var id: UUID; var analysisSession: AnalysisSession?; let bodyText: String; let feePlaceholderText: String; let generatedAt: Date; let baselineSnapshotSummary: String; var lastExportedFileURL: URL? }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Write-once.

interfaces.name: IntakeDraft
interfaces.signature: @Model final class IntakeDraft { var id: UUID; var project: Project?; var rawText: String; var lastAutosavedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Actual recovery path for interrupted/failed/cancelled runs.

interfaces.name: ManualTaggingDraft
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ManualTaggingDraft { var id: UUID; var project: Project?; var sourceText: String; var lastAutosavedAt: Date; var chunks: [ManualTaggingChunk] }
interfaces.notes: Autosaved container for manual-tagging work so relaunch/crash does not lose chunk-level edits.

interfaces.name: EntitlementState
interfaces.signature: struct EntitlementState: Sendable { var isPro: Bool; var canCreateAnotherProject: Bool; var canRunAIExtraction: Bool; var canUsePDFExport: Bool; var verificationIssue: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: UsageMeter
interfaces.signature: struct UsageMeter: Codable, Sendable { var monthKey: String; var completedAIRuns: Int }
interfaces.notes: Persisted quota state; do not infer only from session counting.

interfaces.name: ProjectRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol ProjectRepository: Sendable { func fetchAll() async throws -> [Project]; func create(name: String, clientName: String?, agreementSummary: String) async throws -> Project; func delete(_ project: Project) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: AnalysisRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol AnalysisRepository: Sendable { func fetchIntakeDraft(projectID: UUID) async throws -> IntakeDraft?; func saveIntakeDraft(_ draft: IntakeDraft) async throws; func fetchManualTaggingDraft(projectID: UUID) async throws -> ManualTaggingDraftRecord?; func saveManualTaggingDraft(_ draft: ManualTaggingDraftRecord) async throws; func saveSession(_ session: AnalysisSession) async throws; func fetchSessions(projectID: UUID) async throws -> [AnalysisSession] }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Pure persistence; business rules live in DraftGenerator.

interfaces.name: DraftRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol DraftRepository: Sendable { func saveDraft(_ draft: DraftDocument) async throws; func fetchDrafts(projectID: UUID) async throws -> [DraftDocument] }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ScopeExtractor
interfaces.signature: protocol ScopeExtractor: Sendable { func extract(text: String, baseline: BaselineSnapshot) async throws(ScopeExtractorError) -> ExtractionOutcome }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Called only from within AnalysisOrchestrator.

interfaces.name: ScopeExtractionError
interfaces.signature: enum ScopeExtractionError: Error, Sendable { case modelUnavailable(ModelAvailabilityReason); case cancelled; case inferenceFailed; case emptyInput; case oversizedInput }
interfaces.notes: Typed error contract used by orchestration and UI-state mapping.

interfaces.name: AnalysisOrchestrator
interfaces.signature: protocol AnalysisOrchestrator: Sendable { func runAIAnalysis(projectID: UUID, input: String, sourceOrigin: SourceOrigin) async throws(ScopeExtractorError) -> AnalysisSession; func runManualSegmentation(projectID: UUID, input: String, sourceOrigin: SourceOrigin) async throws(ScopeExtractorError) -> ManualTaggingDraftRecord; func finalizeManualAnalysis(projectID: UUID, draft: ManualTaggingDraftRecord) async throws -> AnalysisSession }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Three-method split; sourceOrigin taken on the two intake-entry methods, read from draft.sourceOrigin at finalize (not passed twice). Single owner of validation, entitlement/quota checks, extractor invocation, quota increment, persistence.

interfaces.name: DraftGenerator
interfaces.signature: protocol DraftGenerator: Sendable { func generateDraft(project: Project, session: AnalysisSession, feePlaceholder: String) throws -> DraftDocument }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Throws if any ReviewItem.isResolved == false.

interfaces.name: ExportService
interfaces.signature: protocol ExportService: Sendable { func exportPlainText(draft: DraftDocument) throws(ExportError) -> URL; func exportPDF(draft: DraftDocument) throws(ExportError) -> URL }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: EntitlementService
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementService: Sendable { func currentEntitlementState() async -> EntitlementState; func refreshEntitlements() async; func purchasePro() async throws; func restorePurchases() async throws }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: UsageMeterStore
interfaces.signature: protocol UsageMeterStore { func loadCurrentMonthMeter(now: Date) async throws -> UsageMeter; func incrementCompletedAIRun(now: Date) async throws; func resetForDebug(now: Date) async throws }
interfaces.notes: Single source of quota truth; increment must happen in one code path only.

interfaces.name: PendingSharedIntake
interfaces.signature: struct PendingSharedIntake: Sendable, Codable { let rawText: String; let projectIDHint: UUID?; let receivedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ShareIngressStore
interfaces.signature: protocol ShareIngressStore: Sendable { func writePending(_ payload: PendingSharedIntake) async throws; func consumePending() async throws -> PendingSharedIntake? }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: RootRouteResolver
interfaces.signature: func resolveInitialRoute(activeProjects: [Project], pendingSharedIntake: PendingSharedIntake?) -> AppRoute
interfaces.notes: Locked. Synchronous, computed before first render.

interfaces.name: AppRoute
interfaces.signature: enum AppRoute: Hashable, Sendable { case projectList, projectHome(UUID), baselineEditor(UUID), intake(UUID), manualTagging(UUID), review(UUID, UUID), draft(UUID), settings }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ReviewScreenModelBuilder
interfaces.signature: func buildReviewSections(from items: [ReviewItemDraft]) -> [ReviewSectionModel]
interfaces.notes: Must enforce section order: flagged first, billable second, in-scope last.

interfaces.name: ReviewSectionModel
interfaces.signature: struct ReviewSectionModel: Identifiable, Sendable { let id: String; let title: String; let items: [ReviewItemDraft] }
interfaces.notes: Derived presentation model only; never persisted.

interfaces.name: DebugFailureHarness
interfaces.signature: struct DebugFailureHarness: Sendable { var forcedAvailability: FoundationModelsAvailability?; var forceEntitlementVerificationIssue: Bool; var forceNeverSyncedEntitlementState: Bool; func resetQuotaCounter() async }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Internal-build-only.

interfaces.name: ReviewItem
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ReviewItem { var id: UUID; var analysisSession: AnalysisSession?; var sourceQuote: String; var normalizedAskText: String; var verdict: Verdict; var rationale: String; var matchedBaselineClauseID: UUID?; var matchedBaselineClauseText: String?; var confidence: Double; var billability: BillabilityRecommendation; var isResolved: Bool; var origin: ProcessingOrigin; var startOffset: Int; var endOffset: Int; var createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Locked. startOffset/endOffset carried through for both AI and manual items so Review can eventually highlight the exact source span. No isDiscarded — a discarded item is structurally never converted into a ReviewItem.

interfaces.name: ManualTaggingChunk
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ManualTaggingChunk { var id: UUID; var text: String; var startOffset: Int; var endOffset: Int; var verdict: Verdict?; var billability: BillabilityRecommendation?; var matchedBaselineClauseID: UUID?; var isDiscarded: Bool; var orderIndex: Int }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED BY COORDINATOR TIE-BREAK: kept as its own type, strictly edit-time. Owns all mid-edit mutable state (optional verdict, isDiscarded, split-by-offset). Never itself becomes a ReviewItem — only resolved, non-discarded chunks get converted at finalizeManualAnalysis. This makes 'a discarded item leaking into the review pipeline' structurally impossible rather than a convention to remember.

interfaces.name: SchemaV1
interfaces.signature: enum SchemaV1: VersionedSchema { static var models: [any PersistentModel.Type] { [Project.self, Baseline.self, BaselineClause.self, AnalysisSession.self, ReviewItem.self, DraftDocument.self, IntakeDraft.self, ManualTaggingDraftRecord.self, ManualTaggingChunk.self, UsageMeterRecord.self] }; static var versionIdentifier: Schema.Version { .init(1,0,0) } }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Includes both ManualTaggingChunk and UsageMeterRecord.

interfaces.name: Verdict
interfaces.signature: enum Verdict: String, Codable, Sendable { case inScope, flaggedForReview, newAndBillable }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Exactly three per-item cases; nothingToFlag is session-level only, never a Verdict case.

interfaces.name: AnalysisOutcomeKind
interfaces.signature: enum AnalysisOutcomeKind: String, Codable, Sendable { case itemsFound, nothingToFlag }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Exactly two cases. Cancelled/failed/backgrounded runs never get a persisted AnalysisSession — IntakeDraft/ManualTaggingDraftRecord autosave is the recovery path.

interfaces.name: SourceOrigin
interfaces.signature: enum SourceOrigin: String, Codable, Sendable { case pastedCold, shareExtension }
interfaces.notes: Locked. How raw text arrived, orthogonal to ProcessingOrigin.

interfaces.name: ExtractorOrigin
interfaces.signature: enum ExtractorOrigin: String, Codable, Sendable { case aiFoundationModels, manual }

interfaces.name: FoundationModelsAvailability
interfaces.signature: enum FoundationModelsAvailability: String, Codable, Sendable { case available, ineligibleHardware, disabledByUser, modelNotDownloaded, quotaExceeded, evictedMidRun }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ScopeExtractorError
interfaces.signature: enum ScopeExtractorError: Error, Sendable { case modelUnavailable(FoundationModelsAvailability); case cancelled; case inferenceFailed; case emptyInput; case oversizedInput(limit: Int) }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ExtractionOutcome
interfaces.signature: enum ExtractionOutcome: Sendable { case items([ReviewItemDraft]); case nothingToFlag }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: BaselineSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct BaselineSnapshot: Sendable { let agreementSummary: String; let deliverables: [BaselineClauseSnapshot]; let exclusions: [BaselineClauseSnapshot]; let revisionPolicy: String?; let assumptions: String?; let timeline: String?; let clientDependencies: String? }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: CandidateAsk
interfaces.signature: struct CandidateAsk: Sendable, Identifiable { let id: UUID; let quoteText: String; let startOffset: Int; let endOffset: Int }
interfaces.notes: Locked. AskSegmenter output; AIScopeExtractor carries these offsets into ReviewItemDraft, ManualScopeExtractor carries them into the initial (pre-chunk) ReviewItemDraft that runManualSegmentation then maps into ManualTaggingChunk rows.

interfaces.name: AIScopeExtractor
interfaces.signature: struct AIScopeExtractor: ScopeExtractor { init(segmenter: AskSegmenter); func extract(text: String, baseline: BaselineSnapshot) async throws(ScopeExtractorError) -> ExtractionOutcome }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Runs off main actor; populates ReviewItemDraft.startOffset/endOffset from the CandidateAsk each item derives from.

interfaces.name: ManualScopeExtractor
interfaces.signature: struct ManualScopeExtractor: ScopeExtractor { init(segmenter: AskSegmenter); func extract(text: String, baseline: BaselineSnapshot) async throws(ScopeExtractorError) -> ExtractionOutcome }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Instant, no model call — returns placeholder ReviewItemDrafts (verdict=.flaggedForReview, isResolved=false) purely to reuse the segmenter+offset pipeline. runManualSegmentation immediately maps each into a ManualTaggingChunk (copying sourceQuote/offsets, dropping the placeholder verdict to nil) — this mapping step is new in this round's resolution and was previously unstated.

interfaces.name: AskSegmenter
interfaces.signature: protocol AskSegmenter: Sendable { func segment(text: String) -> [CandidateAsk] }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Deterministic, NaturalLanguage-framework-backed, exact-match unit testable.

interfaces.name: Plan
interfaces.signature: enum Plan: Sendable { case free, paid }

interfaces.name: QuotaService
interfaces.signature: protocol QuotaService: Sendable { func remainingAIExtractionsThisMonth() async -> Int; func recordCompletedAIRun() async; func debugResetCounter() async }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Called only from AnalysisOrchestrator.runAIAnalysis on completion.

interfaces.name: ExportError
interfaces.signature: enum ExportError: Error, Sendable { case fileWriteFailed; case pdfGenerationFailed; case paywalled }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ShareIntakeIngestService
interfaces.signature: protocol ShareIntakeIngestService: Sendable { func consumePendingIntake() -> PendingIntake? }
interfaces.notes: Reads and deletes the single JSON handoff file from App Group storage on cold launch and scene-active.

interfaces.name: PendingIntake
interfaces.signature: struct PendingIntake: Sendable, Codable { let rawText: String; let projectIDHint: UUID?; let receivedAt: Date; let replacedPreviousUnconsumedShare: Bool }
interfaces.notes: Single-file App Group handoff payload from share extension. Caller surfaces toast if replacedPreviousUnconsumedShare is true.

interfaces.name: ProjectListViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class ProjectListViewModel { var state: ProjectListState; func createProject(name: String, agreementSummary: String) async }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ProjectHomeViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class ProjectHomeViewModel { var baselineStrength: BaselineStrength; var pastAnalyses: [AnalysisSession]; func startAnalysis() }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: BaselineEditorViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class BaselineEditorViewModel { var state: BaselineEditorState; var isLayer2Expanded: Bool; func save() async throws }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: IntakeViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class IntakeViewModel { var state: IntakeState; var availability: FoundationModelsAvailability; func analyze() async; func cancel(); func switchToManual() async }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Delegates entirely to AnalysisOrchestrator; never touches ScopeExtractor/QuotaService directly.

interfaces.name: ManualTaggingViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class ManualTaggingViewModel { var draft: ManualTaggingDraftRecord; var state: ManualTaggingState; func tag(_ chunkID: UUID, verdict: Verdict, billability: BillabilityRecommendation); func discard(_ chunkID: UUID); func split(_ chunkID: UUID, at offset: Int); func finish() async throws -> AnalysisSession }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Operates on ManualTaggingChunk. finish() calls AnalysisOrchestrator.finalizeManualAnalysis.

interfaces.name: ReviewViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class ReviewViewModel { var state: ReviewState; var unresolvedCount: Int; func reclassify(_ item: ReviewItem, as verdict: Verdict); func generateDraft() async throws }
interfaces.notes: Locked. unresolvedCount derived, never manually tracked. Fixed order: flagged, newAndBillable, inScope.

interfaces.name: DraftPreviewViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class DraftPreviewViewModel { var state: DraftPreviewState; func export(format: ExportFormat) async }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: SettingsViewModel
interfaces.signature: @MainActor @Observable final class SettingsViewModel { var state: SettingsState; var entitlement: EntitlementState; var monthlyAIUsage: Int; func restorePurchases() async }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ReviewRowView
interfaces.signature: struct ReviewRowView: View { let item: ReviewItem; let onReclassify: (Verdict) -> Void }
interfaces.notes: Locked. One component parameterized by verdict.

interfaces.name: BottomActionBarView
interfaces.signature: struct BottomActionBarView: View { let variant: BottomActionBarVariant }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: VerdictChipView
interfaces.signature: struct VerdictChipView: View { let verdict: Verdict }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: BaselineStrengthBadgeView
interfaces.signature: struct BaselineStrengthBadgeView: View { let strength: BaselineStrength }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: DesignTokens
interfaces.signature: enum DesignTokens { static let paperBackground: Color; static let ink: Color; static let flaggedColor: Color; static let billableColor: Color; static let inScopeColor: Color; static let hairlineDivider: Color }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Light/dark paired variants per design_handoff.

interfaces.name: DebugForcedFailureToggles
interfaces.signature: struct DebugForcedFailureToggles { var forcedAvailability: FoundationModelsAvailability?; var forcedEntitlementFailure: Bool; var forcedNeverSynced: Bool; func resetQuotaCounter() async }
interfaces.notes: Internal-build-only harness for QA. Required to exercise fail-closed entitlement and forced-manual paths sandbox/local StoreKit config cannot reliably trigger.

interfaces.name: ErrorStateView
interfaces.signature: struct ErrorStateView: View { let title: String; let message: String; let recoveryAction: (() -> Void)? }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Recovery copy required.

interfaces.name: BaselineClauseSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct BaselineClauseSnapshot: Sendable { let id: UUID; let kind: BaselineClauseKind; let text: String }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ManualTaggingDraftRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class ManualTaggingDraftRecord { var id: UUID; var project: Project?; var rawText: String; var sourceOrigin: SourceOrigin; var chunks: [ManualTaggingChunk]; var lastAutosavedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Locked. sourceOrigin stored here so finalizeManualAnalysis doesn't need it passed in twice. chunks is a real cascade-delete SwiftData relationship, not an encoded blob.

interfaces.name: UsageMeterRecord
interfaces.signature: @Model final class UsageMeterRecord { var monthKey: String; var completedAIRuns: Int }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: RunPreference
interfaces.signature: enum RunPreference: String, Sendable { case automaticPreferred, forceManual }
interfaces.notes: User preference passed into intake/orchestration decisions. Distinct from ProcessingOrigin.

interfaces.name: ProcessingOrigin
interfaces.signature: enum ProcessingOrigin: String, Codable, Sendable { case aiAssisted, manual }
interfaces.notes: Locked. Recorded fact of how a session/item was actually processed. No separate 'preference' enum exists — the orchestrator method invoked encodes that.

interfaces.name: ProjectListState
interfaces.signature: enum ProjectListState: Sendable { case empty; case loaded([Project]); case atFreeTierLimit([Project]) }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: BaselineStrength
interfaces.signature: enum BaselineStrength: Sendable { case weak, healthy }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: BaselineEditorState
interfaces.signature: enum BaselineEditorState: Sendable { case firstTimeEmpty, editing, savedConfirmation, validationError(String) }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: IntakeState
interfaces.signature: enum IntakeState: Sendable { case empty; case autosaving; case loadingAI; case aiUnavailable(FoundationModelsAvailability); case midRunInterrupted; case oversizedInput(limit: Int); case manualMode }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ManualTaggingState
interfaces.signature: enum ManualTaggingState: Sendable { case noChunksYet, chunkedUnresolved, readyToContinue }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ReviewState
interfaces.signature: enum ReviewState: Sendable { case loading; case populated; case nothingToFlag; case blockedByUnresolvedItems }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: DraftPreviewState
interfaces.signature: enum DraftPreviewState: Sendable { case generated(DraftDocument); case exportSuccess(URL); case exportError(ExportError) }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: SettingsState
interfaces.signature: enum SettingsState: Sendable { case free, paid, restoreInProgress, restoreFailed(String), verificationTroubleDefaultingFree }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: ExportFormat
interfaces.signature: enum ExportFormat: Sendable { case plainText, pdf }
interfaces.notes: Locked.

interfaces.name: BottomActionBarVariant
interfaces.signature: enum BottomActionBarVariant { case enabled(label: String, action: @Sendable () -> Void); case blocked(unresolvedCount: Int); case loading }
interfaces.notes: Locked.
